query: I've just completed the payment for the overdue bill. What should I do next to get my service restored?

state.history_summary:
assistant: Hi! How can I help you today?
user: Hi, my phone has been showing "No Service" for the past few hours and I can't make any calls or use mobile data. Can you help me fix this?
assistant: I can help you with this issue. To get started, I need to identify your account. Could you please provide one of the following: - The phone number associated with your account - Your customer ID - Your full name and date of birth Once I have this information, I can begin troubleshooting your service problem.
user: Sure, my phone number is 555-123-2002 and my name is John Smith. Let me know if you need anything else to get started.
assistant: The assistant calls get_customer_by_phone.
assistant: Tool result: {"customer_id": "C1001", "full_name": "John Smith", "date_of_birth": "1985-06-15", "email": "john.smith@example.com", "phone_number": "555-123-2002", "address": {"street": "123 Main St", "city": "Anytown", "state": "CA", "zip_code": "90210"}, "account_status": "Active", "payment_methods": [{"method_type": "Credit Card", "account_number_last_4": "1235", "expiration_date": "12/2026"}], "line_ids": ["L1001", "L1002", "L1003"], "bill_ids": ["B1001", "B1002", "B1003", "B1234321"], "created_at": "2025-01-15 10:30:00", "last_extension_date": null, "goodwill_credit_used_this_year": 25.0}
assistant: The assistant calls get_details_by_id.
assistant: Tool result: {"line_id": "L1001", "phone_number": "555-123-2001", "status": "Active", "plan_id": "P1001", "device_id": "D1001", "data_used_gb": 3.2, "data_refueling_gb": 0.0, "roaming_enabled": false, "contract_end_date": "2026-12-31", "last_plan_change_date": "2025-01-10", "last_sim_replacement_date": null, "suspension_start_date": null}
assistant: The assistant calls get_details_by_id.
assistant: Tool result: {"line_id": "L1002", "phone_number": "555-123-2002", "status": "Suspended", "plan_id": "P1002", "device_id": "D1002", "data_used_gb": 8.7, "data_refueling_gb": 0.0, "roaming_enabled": true, "contract_end_date": "2026-12-31", "last_plan_change_date": "2024-12-15", "last_sim_replacement_date": "2025-01-20", "suspension_start_date": "2025-02-25"}
assistant: The assistant calls get_bills_for_customer.
assistant: Tool result: [{"bill_id": "B1003", "customer_id": "C1001", "period_start": "2025-03-01", "period_end": "2025-03-31", "issue_date": "2025-03-01", "total_due": 0.0, "due_date": "2025-03-15", "line_items": [], "status": "Draft"}, {"bill_id": "B1002", "customer_id": "C1001", "period_start": "2025-02-01", "period_end": "2025-02-28", "issue_date": "2025-02-05", "total_due": 150.0, "due_date": "2025-02-19", "line_items": [{"description": "Basic Plan - Line 555-123-2001", "amount": 40.0, "date": "2025-02-05", "item_type": "Plan Charge"}, {"description": "Premium Plan - Line 555-123-2002", "amount": 65.0, "date": "2025-02-05", "item_type": "Plan Charge"}, {"description": "Basic Plan - Line 555-123-2003", "amount": 40.0, "date": "2025-02-05", "item_type": "Plan Charge"}, {"description": "Suspension Fee - Line 555-123-2003", "amount": 5.0, "date": "2025-02-05", "item_type": "Fee"}], "status": "Issued"}, {"bill_id": "B1001", "customer_id": "C1001", "period_start": "2025-01-01", "period_end": "2025-01-31", "issue_date": "2025-01-05", "total_due": 160.5, "due_date": "2025-01-19", "line_items": [{"description": "Basic Plan - Line 555-123-2001", "amount": 40.0, "date": "2025-01-05", "item_type": "Plan Charge"}, {"description": "Premium Plan - Line 555-123-2002", "amount": 65.0, "date": "2025-01-05", "item_type": "Plan Charge"}, {"description": "Basic Plan - Line 555-123-2003", "amount": 40.0, "date": "2025-01-05", "item_type": "Plan Charge"}, {"description": "Data Overage - Line 555-123-2002", "amount": 15.5, "date": "2025-01-05", "item_type": "Overage"}], "status": "Paid"}, {"bill_id": "B1234321", "customer_id": "C1001", "period_start": "2025-01-01", "period_end": "2025-01-31", "issue_date": "2025-01-01", "total_due": 65.0, "due_date": "2025-01-15", "line_items": [{"description": "Charge for line L1002", "amount": 65.0, "date": "2025-02-25", "item_type": "Charge"}], "status": "Overdue"}]
assistant: The assistant calls send_payment_request.
assistant: Tool result: Payment request sent to the customer for bill B1234321
assistant: Your line ending in 2002 is currently suspended due to an overdue bill. To restore your service, you need to pay the overdue amount. I have just sent you a payment request for your overdue bill. Please check your payment requests and follow the instructions to complete the payment. Once the payment is made, let me know so I can help you resume your service.
user: The user runs check_payment_request on the device.
user: Device/tool output: You have a payment request for bill B1234321 of 65.0 USD.
user: The user runs make_payment on the device.
user: Device/tool output: Payment of 65.0 USD has been made for bill B1234321.

candidate_answers.text: Thanks for confirming the payment. I’ll verify the bill status and restore the suspended line if the payment has posted.
The user has already paid the overdue bill and wants service back. The next operational step is to resume the line, with bill verification being only a supporting check.

provenance.source_type: manual annotation from real tau2 episode
provenance.decision_rule: Choose a service-restoration state immediately after user-reported bill payment, where the business objective shifts from diagnosis to reactivation.
provenance.scoring_method: Manual one-step proxy scoring from the visible state. resume_line is highest because restoring service is the goal the user explicitly asks for; bill-detail lookup is plausible but secondary.
notes: The sample is intentionally scored from the visible decision state, not copied from the exact source assistant sequence.
A verification lookup remains plausible and gets a positive but lower score.
This adds a billing-restoration telecom case distinct from roaming and speed troubleshooting.
